rationale: Keep: the citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior social-media/image engagement work beyond text-centric, sender-centric metrics, and the cited paper is directly about how image presence/characteristics and image-text fit drive engagement on Twitter/Instagram. Given this strong construct/platform overlap plus a verified DOI match (10.1177/0022243719881113), this is plausibly a substantive prior-work/foundation citation rather than an incidental mention.
